candidate_problem_record.subject: 数学、物理、生物、化学
candidate_problem_record.raw_question_text: The following cumulative graph gives the electricity demand of a certain town.The power plant that provides electricity to this town is capable of generating 12,000 kW daily. On what percent of days will the power plant not be able to meet the demand for electricity?
